mapper.sql: sb.id, sb.bonus_name, sb.month, sb.release_time, sb.money, sb.comment, sb.create_time, sb.create_by, sb.update_time, sb.update_by, sb.enabled_flag

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.bonus_name as ${tAlias}_bonus_name, ${tAlias}.month as ${tAlias}_month, ${tAlias}.release_time as ${tAlias}_release_time, ${tAlias}.money as ${tAlias}_money, ${tAlias}.comment as ${tAlias}_comment, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag

select isnull((select top 1 pe.name from pm_employee pe join fnd_user fu on fu.id = sb.update_by and fu.employee_id = pe.id ), '') as last_update_by,
from swm_bonus sb
mapper.insert: insert into swm_bonus (bonus_name, month, release_time, money, comment, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, enabled_flag) values (#{bonusName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{month,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{releaseTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{money,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enabledFlag, jdbcType=BIT})
mapper.update: update swm_bonus set bonus_name = #{bonusName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, month = #{month,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, release_time = #{releaseTime,jdbcType=DATE}, money = #{money,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, comment = #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag, jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
